name: Bitcoin IOU — Tranche B
tagline: Bitcoin-backed IOU instrument — Deal Series B — issued via Troptions Gateway.
description: BTCB is a Bitcoin-backed IOU issued by the Troptions Gateway on the XRP Ledger and Stellar mainnet. Each unit represents a redeemable claim on Bitcoin value under the terms of the Troptions Deal Series B project agreement. Issuance, transfer, and redemption are governed by the Troptions compliance framework and applicable deal documentation.
longDescription: BTCB is Tranche B of the Troptions Bitcoin IOU series, structured to support the second Troptions capital-deployment project. The issuer (Troptions Gateway) maintains Bitcoin reserves in a segregated multi-sig custody arrangement. Holders may present BTCB IOUs for redemption against Bitcoin or USD-equivalent value subject to KYC verification and deal terms. The instrument is issued on both XRPL (hex currency code 4254434200000000000000000000000000000000) and Stellar (asset code BTCB) from the same governance-controlled issuer addresses.

compliance.redemptionTerms: Redemption requires KYC verification and execution of deal Series B redemption form. Bitcoin or USD-equivalent disbursed within 5 business days.
compliance.custodyArrangement: Multi-sig Bitcoin custody, segregated from operating accounts.
